name: xpssh
description: SSH key manager for git providers — generate, configure, test, and manage SSH keys for GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket, and Azure DevOps with a rich terminal UI

scripts.build: bun build src/index.tsx --target node --outdir dist --banner '#!/usr/bin/env node'
scripts.prepublishOnly: bun run typecheck && bun run test && bun run build

author: vancityAyush <vancityayush@gmail.com>
